title: Add standard waivers?
body:
I'm seeking opinions on UVM waivers.

We're getting closer to having UVM.  There's many lint waivers currently reported inside UVM.

When a lint failure seems it shouldn't be reported I've been fixing Verilator. Some others I've fed upstream to Accelera, but it will be a while before those propagate to an official release.

I'm thinking it will be a better user experience if we by default suppress warnings inside the UVM code.  One path would be to suppress them inside uvm-verilator code - but that presumes a user is using that version, and also the suppressions may not match what a specific version of verilator needs, after e.g. a new warning is added.

So I'm thinking we should have a default waiver file, e.g. `include/verilated_waivers.vlt`.  This would be used unless `--no-std-waiver` is used (and `--no-std` would change to `--no-std-pkg`, and `--no-std` would then mean `--no-std-pkg --no-std-waiver`.

For example here's some needed:

```
`verilator_config
lint_off -rule CONSTRAINTIGN -file "*/uvm/src/reg/uvm_mem_mam.svh"
lint_off -rule CONSTRAINTIGN -file "*/uvm/src/reg/uvm_reg_field.svh"
lint_off -rule CONSTRAINTIGN -file "*/uvm/src/reg/uvm_reg_fifo.svh"
lint_off -rule CONSTRAINTIGN -file "*/uvm/src/reg/uvm_reg_item.svh"
lint_off -rule CONSTRAINTIGN -file "*/uvm/src/seq/uvm_sequence_library.svh"
lint_off -rule MISINDENT -file "*/uvm/src/base/uvm_cmdline_processor.svh"
lint_off -rule MISINDENT -file "*/uvm/src/seq/uvm_sequencer_base.svh"
lint_off -rule MISINDENT -file "*/uvm/src/reg/uvm_reg_map.svh"
```

Also I'm wondering if we should be even more specific and also as a new feature match against a module (/package/class) name?

```
lint_off -rule MISINDENT -module uvm_heartbeat -file "*/uvm/src/base/uvm_cmdline_processor.svh"
lint_off -rule MISINDENT -module uvm_push_sequencer -file "*/uvm/src/seq/uvm_sequence_base.svh"
lint_off -rule MISINDENT -module uvm_reg_map  -file "*/uvm/src/reg/uvm_reg_map.svh"
lint_off -rule MISINDENT -module uvm_reg_mem_built_in_seq -file "*/uvm/src/reg/sequences/uvm_reg_mem_hdl_paths_seq.svh"
lint_off -rule MISINDENT -module uvm_sequencer_base -file "*/uvm/src/seq/uvm_sequencer_base.svh"

```

Thoughts, especially @gezalore and @wallento?
